summary: HNSW has been reopened as the only active algorithm-improvement line. The historical 2026-03-12 verdict remains the starting baseline: recall is trusted, but native is still about 14.8x faster on the same remote x86 lane.
action: Use this artifact as the reopen progress baseline. Keep historical final verdict artifacts intact, but judge future HNSW sessions by whether new authority evidence improves on this baseline without recall regression.
